case_title: SMITH, MARVIN JR. VS SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $893.00 FILED BY SMITH, MARVIN JR. AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2005 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, MARVIN JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE. $893.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE. HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLTF FILED DECLARATION FOR CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFT.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF DEC-09-2005, GRANTED
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGEMENT SENT TO DEFT, RETURNED UNDELIVERED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SCOTT PARE DBA DONATE DON'T TRADE.
